description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 6/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Define the operation return contract for controls.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Defined the V3 control return contract in Jidoka.Control and taught the existing guardrail runner to accept :cont and {:block, reason} while preserving legacy :ok/{:error, reason}/{:interrupt, interrupt}. Added operation-control tests for allow/block decisions. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, focused guardrail/DSL tests, mix test.

title: E1: Define the operation return contract for controls
